scenarios.description: STAB + 4x super effective: Fire/Flying vs Grass/Bug - tests stacked multipliers with sequential floor (ERRATA #3C)
scenarios.note: STAB Fire vs Grass/Bug type — both 2x, sequential floor means product may differ from 4x directly. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm TypeEffectiveness

scenarios.description: Critical hit ignores stat stages and screens, and uses base Speed for crit rate calculation
scenarios.note: Crit rate = floor(base_speed / 2) / 256. Mewtwo base Speed 130 → 65/256 ~25%. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm CriticalHit

scenarios.description: Burned attacker has Attack halved when calculating physical damage
scenarios.note: Burn halves Attack stat in damage calc. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm GetCurrentAttackDefense

scenarios.description: Maximum damage roll uses 255/255 random factor
scenarios.note: Random factor: chosen in range [217, 255], max roll = 255. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm RandomizeDamage

scenarios.description: Minimum damage roll uses 217/255 random factor
scenarios.note: Random factor: chosen in range [217, 255], min roll = 217. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm RandomizeDamage

scenarios.description: Level 1 attacker edge case for integer division in damage formula
scenarios.note: Level 1 with floor(2*1/5 + 2) = 2 in step 1. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm CalcDamage

scenarios.description: Seismic Toss deals damage equal to attacker level
scenarios.note: Fixed damage = attacker level. Ignores type effectiveness on non-immune. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/effect_commands.asm SeismicToss

scenarios.description: Dragon Rage always deals 40 damage
scenarios.note: Fixed damage = 40. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/effect_commands.asm DragonRage

scenarios.description: Sonic Boom always deals 20 damage
scenarios.note: Fixed damage = 20. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/effect_commands.asm SonicBoom

scenarios.description: Struggle deals damage-based recoil: floor(damage / 2), not max HP
scenarios.note: Recoil = floor(damage / 2), not max HP. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/effect_commands.asm StruggleEffect

scenarios.description: Explosion and Self-Destruct halve the target's Defense stat in the damage formula
scenarios.note: Defense is halved (floor) before damage calc. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm CalcDamage ExplodeHalveDefense

scenarios.description: Ghost-type moves do 0 damage vs Psychic-type in Gen 1 (cartridge bug — immunity from table lookup order)
scenarios.note: Ghost vs Psychic = 0x in Gen 1. This is a cartridge bug — the lookup exits early. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm TypeEffectiveness GHOST_IMMUNITY_BUG

scenarios.description: Focus Energy divides crit rate by 4 (bug) instead of multiplying by 4 as documented
scenarios.note: Focus Energy bug: crit rate is floor(base_speed/2)/256 then divided by 4, not multiplied. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm FocusEnergy CriticalHitChance

scenarios.description: Reflect halves physical damage (multiplies effective Defense by 2)
scenarios.note: Reflect doubles the defender's defense in damage calc. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm ReflectEffect

scenarios.description: Dual-type defender: effectiveness multipliers applied sequentially with floor between each
scenarios.note: Electric vs Water/Flying = 2x * 2x = 4x. Floor is applied after each multiplication. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm TypeEffectiveness sequential

scenarios.description: Level 100 attacker with max DVs and Stat Exp: verify no integer overflow in damage formula
scenarios.note: Max-stat damage path: intermediate values fit in Gen 1's 16-bit arithmetic. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm CalcDamage overflow path

scenarios.description: 1/256 miss bug: moves with 100% accuracy still have a 1/256 chance to miss
scenarios.note: Gen 1 accuracy formula: floor(accuracy * stage) / 256. At 100% accuracy with no modifiers = 255/256, leaving a 1/256 miss. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm AccuracyCheck

scenarios.description: Light Screen halves special damage (multiplies effective Special Defense by 2)
scenarios.note: Light Screen doubles the defender's special in damage calc, analogous to Reflect for physical. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm LightScreenEffect

scenarios.description: Paralysis reduces Speed to 25% of stat (floor), affecting turn order
scenarios.note: Paralysed Speed = floor(speed / 4). Affects turn order but not damage directly. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm GetModifiedSpeed ParalysisCheck

scenarios.description: Badge boosts (1.125x each) compound across ALL stats when Gym badges are earned — cross-stat bug
scenarios.note: Each badge boost multiplies the current stat by 9/8 and applies to all stats (not just the boosted one). ERRATA #3B. Source: pret/pokered engine/battle/core.asm ApplyBadgeStatBoosts
